scope: consolidated cross-model review of the whole ui/shell-and-chat-refit branch
rationale: the refit is one cohesive change across two disjoint trees; a single adversarial review over the branch diff is more effective than 7 thin per-slice reviews and keeps Codex calls serialized.

findingsFoundAndFixed.what: voice TTS/STT proxy fetches had no timeout
findingsFoundAndFixed.fix: AbortSignal.timeout(20000) + 504 on TimeoutError/AbortError in dev-env server.mjs

findingsFoundAndFixed.what: push-to-talk mic could outlive the chat pane (no unmount cleanup)
findingsFoundAndFixed.fix: streamRef + unmount cleanup stops recorder + all tracks

findingsFoundAndFixed.what: mic could start after unmount (pending getUserMedia race)
findingsFoundAndFixed.fix: voiceMountedRef cancelled-guard after the await; onstop bails before state/network

findingsFoundAndFixed.what: sessions split left pre-existing compositions grouped under stale faculty keys
findingsFoundAndFixed.fix: migrateSelectionsByFaculty re-buckets by current library faculty on every read + regression test

findingsFoundAndFixed.what: rapid double-start could orphan a live mic stream (re-entrancy)
findingsFoundAndFixed.fix: synchronous recBusyRef guard set before the await, cleared on every exit

codexReview.round4: approve — no findings; the re-entrancy fix confirmed and no new ship-blocker.

codexPwTest.note: independent live-browser drive of the shell: sidebar nav (no Armory/Run), /run->/, /armory->/compose, /compose counts+cross-faculty search (4 fittings/3 faculties), Quarters collapse/expand. 0 console errors/warnings, 0 failures.
